================================================================================
Source with hyphens
================================================================================

{
  "key": "some---value",
  "other": "a-b-c"
}

---

this is NOT the divider because the one below is longer

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

(document
  (object
    (pair
      (string
        (string_content))
      (string
        (string_content)))
    (pair
      (string
        (string_content))
      (string
        (string_content)))))
